title: Chapter 001

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: After a century without the Avatar, Katara and Sokka discover a figure encased in ice, marking the end of the long wait.
lines.visual_anchor: Katara and Sokka on the ice, glowing sphere in background
uncertainty_notes: Figure in ice is presumed Aang; not fully confirmed visually.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The narration flashes back to Aang’s early training, anchoring Katara’s belief that he is destined to save the world.
lines.visual_anchor: Young Aang shown in airbending flashback
uncertainty_notes: Narration is inferred to be Katara's.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The payoff lands: Katara’s faith in Aang’s potential is affirmed with conviction.
lines.visual_anchor: Bold text 'I WAS RIGHT.' on white background
uncertainty_notes: No visuals of speaker, assertion based on narration arc.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A tense scene shows the aftermath of battle—a body collapsed, another stands in the haze—marking transition from hope to hard-won outcome.
lines.visual_anchor: Figure standing and another lying on smoky ground

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Narration confirms Aang has defeated Fire Lord Ozai, ending the war with his friends’ help.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Zuko is named the new Fire Lord, inheriting the throne from his father.
uncertainty_notes: No visual confirmation of Zuko, only stated in narration.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A visual of Zuko on the palace balcony before a crowd cements his new status as Fire Lord.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A brief transitional moment bridges the celebration of new leadership to the promise of peace ahead.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Narration recounts the promise between Aang, Zuko, and Earth King Kuei to restore harmony across the Four Nations.

lines.speaker: Aang
lines.text: Aang examines a map, realizes the Earth Kingdom is filled with Fire Nation colonies, and confirms this with a brief exchange.
lines.visual_anchor: Aang’s hand with blue arrow tattoo on the map; two speech bubbles

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The group reflects on the colonies as lingering scars of war, shifting the mood from triumph to the challenges of lasting peace.
lines.visual_anchor: Gathered group at table, map visible
uncertainty_notes: Speaker attribution within group is unclear.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: An Earth Kingdom official, realizing Zuko is present, nervously assures the Fire Lord that the critique wasn’t meant personally.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Zuko publicly accepts responsibility for the colonial legacy and pledges to repair the damage.
uncertainty_notes: Earth King Kuei presence inferred, not pictured.

lines.speaker: Aang
lines.text: Aang points out the difficult transition ahead and volunteers to oversee a peaceful process, as chaos briefly breaks out in the background.
uncertainty_notes: Who is splashed and which animal caused it are unclear.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A bear-like figure expresses surprise at Aang’s initiative, but Aang cheerfully insists peaceful conflict resolution is what he does as the Avatar.
lines.visual_anchor: Aang beaming, bear-like figure in foreground
uncertainty_notes: Bear's identity not confirmed; likely Earth King Kuei.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Amid enthusiastic support from an official, Katara volunteers herself and Sokka to help, prompting Sokka’s exasperation and Aang’s disappointment about changing plans.
lines.visual_anchor: Katara gesturing, Sokka arms crossed, Aang downtrodden
uncertainty_notes: Identity of small figure and bear not confirmed.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The group solidifies their mission’s hopefulness by naming it ‘The Harmony Restoration Movement’ with rising enthusiasm.
lines.visual_anchor: Official thinking, young companion excitedly interrupting
uncertainty_notes: Energetic shouter is likely Katara but not visually confirmed.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Cheers erupt as the new movement’s name is shouted in affirmation, launching the team into unified collective action.
uncertainty_notes: Speaker unseen, but contextually from group.

unresolved_or_uncertain: Identity of figure in the ice in panel 002 is inferred, not visually confirmed.
Speaker of affirmation in panel 011 is not identified.
Bear-like figure in 016 and 017 is likely Earth King's bear but not fully confirmed.
Smaller figures (such as the one in green in 017) and a few background characters remain unnamed.
Speaker for the enthusiastic shout in 019 is unseen but contextually clear.
